features: Microwave & Dishwasher Safe for Everyday Use – This 11oz Tea mug is designed to keep up with daily life. Pop it in the microwave to reheat your drink it in the dishwasher when you’re done-it won’t fade, peel, or lose its shine. More reliable than your Wi-Fi signal, this tea cup keeps looking sharp while serving tea, coffee, or hot chocolate every single time.

Premium Handmade Ceramic with Glossy Finish – Crafted with care and attention to detail, this ceramic mug is made from strong materials with a smooth glossy coating that enhances the vibrant design. Each tea mug is handmade, giving it a unique feel that makes your morning brew extra special. Built to last and created to impress both in style and durability.

Ideal 11oz Capacity for Tea, Coffee & More – The perfect size for a standard tea cup, coffee cup, or even hot chocolate. Whether you need a sensible herbal tea, a big morning brew, or a mid-afternoon pick-me-up, this large mug hits the sweet spot-big enough to fuel your day, yet light and comfortable to handle.

Bold Music-Inspired Design That Lasts – Featuring a cheeky nod to Oasis’ legendary Definitely Maybe album, this funny mug design stays fresh and vibrant wash after wash. No fading, no peeling, no nonsense-just a lasting tribute to Britpop glory. A stylish gift mug for any fan who wants to bring a touch of ’90s nostalgia into their everyday routine.

Comfortable, Glossy & Leftie-Friendly – Finished with a shiny glaze, this cute mug looks sleek on any shelf or desk. Designed for both left-handed and right-handed use, the artwork shows perfectly whichever way you sip. A practical yet eye-catching ceramic travel mug alternative for home, office, or gifting.
